zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Harriet Travers於1641年出生在英國盧特藍德卡爾德可特時，她的父親Rawleigh Travers19歲，母親Elizabeth Cole Hussey19歲。她於1660年與John Carter Cave在英國諾薩普頓史爾卡爾德可特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1693年11月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Harriet Travers于1641年出生在英国盧特藍德卡爾德可特时，她的父亲Rawleigh Travers19岁，母亲Elizabeth Cole Hussey19岁。她于1660年与John Carter Cave在英国諾薩普頓史爾卡爾德可特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1693年11月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Travers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Travis 1 and a cognate of 3 below, or a variant of Trevors, itself a variant of Trevor .
Irish (Leitrim and Donegal; of Anglo-Norman origin): variant of   Trower  .

French: topographic name for someone who lived at a crossing place, Old French travers, or a habitational name from (Le) Travers, the name of several places in various parts of France, named with this word.

variants.name: Travis
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): from Old French and Middle English travers, also Middle English travas, travis, a word with several meanings. It may denote a toll paid for the right to cross a boundary or bridge, the surname perhaps being for someone who paid or collected such tolls. Alternatively, it may mean ‘crosswise, sideways’ or ‘dispute, disagreement’. The Old French word also had the sense ‘crossing, passage’, and it is more than likely that the surname is Norman in origin, for someone who lived at a crossing place or at a place so named (compare French Travers 3). The presence of the preposition ‘de’ (and perhaps also ‘le’) in early forms of the surname appears to indicate a topographic or habitational explanation, but the French preposition and definite article were sometimes added gratuitously to Norman surnames as a sign of their high social status. See also Travers 1.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Harriet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of French Henriette, a feminine diminutive of Henry (French Henri) coined in the 17th century. It was quite common in England in the 18th and early 19th centuries.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Harriet Travers was born in 1641, in Caldecott, Rutland, England, her father, Rawleigh Travers, was 19 and her mother, Elizabeth Cole Hussey, was 19. She married John Carter Cave in 1660, in Caldecott, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 November 1693, in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Harriet Travers est née en 1641, à Caldecott, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, Rawleigh Travers, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cole Hussey, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Carter Cave en 1660, à Caldecott, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 novembre 1693, à Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Harriet Travers 1641 in Caldecott, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rawleigh Travers 19 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Cole Hussey 19. Sie hat 1660 in Caldecott, Northamptonshire, England John Carter Cave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. November 1693 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Harriet Travers è nata il nel 1641 nel Caldecott, Rutland, England, sua padre, Rawleigh Travers, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Cole Hussey, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Carter Cave nel 1660, nel Caldecott, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 novembre 1693, nel Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 52 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Harriet Travers(이)가 1641년 영국 루틀랜드 캘데컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rawleigh Travers(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Cole Hussey(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1660년 영국 노르섬프토실르 캘데컷에서 John Carter Cave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1693년 11월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Harriet Travers nasceu em 1641, em Caldecott, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Rawleigh Travers, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cole Hussey, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Carter Cave em 1660, em Caldecott, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1693, em Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Harriet Travers родилась в 1641 г. в местности калдекотт, рутланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Rawleigh Travers было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cole Hussey, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Carter Cave в 1660 г. в местности калдекотт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 ноября 1693 г. в местности миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Harriet Travers nació en 1641, en Caldecott, Rutland, Inglaterra, su papá, Rawleigh Travers, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cole Hussey, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Carter Cave en 1660, en Caldecott, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1693, en Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 52 años.
